mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, title, content, scope_type, sort_order, created_at FROM quick_reply_template WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, business_domain_id, title, content, scope_type, sort_order, created_at FROM quick_reply_template WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, business_domain_id, scope_type, title, content, category, status, sort_order FROM quick_reply_template WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quick_reply_template ( business_domain_id, scope_type, title, content, category, status, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessDomainId}, #{scopeType}, #{title}, #{content}, NULL, 'active', #{sortOrder}, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE quick_reply_template SET scope_type = #{scopeType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM quick_reply_template WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
